name: maya-mcp
description: Control a local Autodesk Maya session through a typed MCP tool surface.
long_description: Maya MCP runs locally on the user's workstation and talks to Autodesk Maya through Maya's localhost commandPort. It exposes typed tools for scene inspection, nodes, selection, mesh data, modeling, shading, skinning, animation, curves, viewport capture, and approved script workflows. Raw code execution is disabled by default and must be explicitly enabled.

maya_port.title: Maya commandPort
maya_port.description: Local Maya commandPort number. The default Maya MCP setup uses 7001.

connect_timeout.title: Connect timeout
connect_timeout.description: Seconds to wait while connecting to Maya.

command_timeout.title: Command timeout
command_timeout.description: Seconds to wait for Maya to respond to a command.

script_dirs.title: Approved script directories
script_dirs.description: Optional semicolon-separated absolute directories for script.list and script.execute.

enable_raw_execution.title: Enable raw script.run
enable_raw_execution.description: Allow raw Python or MEL execution in Maya. Leave disabled unless you understand the risk.
